title: Litematica Quick-Share Addon
description: Adds a button in schematics list to quickly share any .litematic file via a short url
body:
# Litematica Quick-Share Addon for Litematica

**Litematica Quick-Share Addon** is an extension for Litematica that allows you to instantly share schematics using a short link directly from the Litematica schematic list, without ever leaving Minecraft

A Quick-Share button is added directly to each schematic item inside Litematica. With a single click, a unique URL is generated using [Choculaterie's API](https://choculaterie.com), opening your schematic in a **3D web viewer**, making it easy to showcase builds to friends
 
> [Join our Discord Community](https://discord.choculaterie.com)  
> [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Choculaterie/Quick-Share-Addon) <- Starring it helps me a lot <3

---

## Features

- **Instant Shareable Links**  
  Generate a short URL that opens your schematic in a **3D web viewer**

- **No Account or Publishing Required**  
  Share schematics instantly without logging in or creating projects

- **Strong OpenGraph Integration**  
  When sharing on discord and other social plateform, it will show the title and generate a picture of the litematic

---

## How to Report Issues

If you encounter bugs, crashes, or have suggestions for improvements:

- Open an issue on the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Choculaterie/Quick-Share-Addon/issues)
- Or join the [Discord Server](https://discord.choculaterie.com) to chat directly with me and the community

When reporting issues, please include:
- Your Minecraft version
- Fabric version
- Litematica version
- List of installed mods
- Any relevant crash logs or game logs
